rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited in the paper, providing a comprehensive bibliography of related work and foundational research.
Discusses the challenges of training MoE models and introduces Lory, which uses causal segment routing and similarity-based data batching. Lory outperforms dense models on perpl...
Reviews related work on MoE models, fully differentiable MoE architectures, and similarity-based data batching, positioning Lory within the broader context of research.
